# uapi_package (Data Source)

Look up an installed package by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_package" "curl" {
  id = "curl"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Resource id to look up.

### Read-Only

- `installed` (Boolean) Whether the package is installed.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
- `name` (String) apk package name.
- `version` (String) Installed package version.
